Scale Skin  

Description

4: Increase AC by 3 (L3) to 9 (L10)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 25 Skill: Abjuration
Casting Time: 2.5 Recast Time: 4.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You grow scales.
Cast on other: Soandso grows scales.
Effect Fades: You shed your scales.

Game Description

Causes your target to grow hard scales around their body, increasing their armor class for 9.0 mins @L3 to 27.0 mins @L9. Consumes snake scales when cast.

Reagents

  • Snake Scales x 1

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Scale Skin

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Scale Skin
ClassLevel
BST10
SHM3
Expansion:

Duration:
9.0 mins @L3 to 27.0 mins @L9
  • Comments (10)
  • Sold By (11)
  • Quested (1)
  • Screenshots
Add Image

Shadow Haven
  • Frewin Strongpaw - 4sp 6cp

Shar Vahl
  • Scribe Mojir - Luclin - 4sp 6cp

The Mines of Gloomingdeep
  • Celrak - 2gp 5sp 4cp

The Plane of Knowledge
  • Mystic Abomin - 4sp 6cp
  • Primalist Saosith - 4sp 6cp

Components Required...
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2003 at 3:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175367265
Sage
379 posts
This spell requires Snake Scales to function. Does anyone know where to get those on Luclin?
▲ Page top
RE: Components Required...
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2005 at 10:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591845623163
1 post
Snake Scales sold in Swamp of No Hope....Vendor at the Cabalis Outpost Ruins:
Kiok Migo /loc 2457.58, 2910.70, 44.41 top floor
▲ Page top
RE: Components Required...
QuoteReply
# Jan 03 2004 at 3:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966228402
194 posts
On Luclin, you can get them off a vendor in the Shaman guild... there's a room which leads to the BST trainer one way and to the SHM trainer the opposite way, the vendor is near the SHM one.
▲ Page top
RE: Components Required...
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2003 at 11:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362021732
View User Forum
4 posts
First merchant when you zone into East Commonland, from Freeport, has as many as you want.
▲ Page top
RE: Components Required...
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2003 at 3:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779261179
Scholar
58 posts
Generally you can buy Snake Scales in Caster Guilds (i.e. Sham, Bst, Mage, etc.) But you can also get em from the guy in the bazaar that sells spell components. Across from the merchant selling the Trader's Satchels. I think they are also available from one of the merchants in the bottom of the building containing the Sham, Druid, Bst, Rng guilds...y'know, the one with the tree inside.
▲ Page top
